title: PATIENT NAVIGATION - 211info
text: KAISER PERMANENTE NORTHEAST REGION MEDICAL GROUP PATIENT NAVIGATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assistance offered to those facing difficulty accessing services and resources. 500 NE Multnomah Boulevard Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Kaiser members who need help navigating health care or need assistance connecting to social resources Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (503) 813-2000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 813-2000 Toll-free (800) 813-2000 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to make an appointment with a Community Health Navigator FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Marion, Multnomah, Polk, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Navigator Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - CANCER COUNSELING CENTER HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH ENGAGEMENT AND WELLNESS SERVICES HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - MEDICAL FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KAISER PERMANENTE NORTHEAST REGION MEDICAL GROUP
